hero_subtitle: An intelligent AI assistant console programmatically powered by the Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) and MongoDB MCP toolsets.
bullet_2: Pipes real-time execution logs from Python ADK
bullet_3: Fully sandboxed and secure database diagnostics
footer_landing: Fahem Project Console • Google Cloud Rapid Agent Hackathon
dashboard_subtitle: Google ADK & MongoDB MCP Assistant Console

footer_dashboard_line1: Fahem Console Dashboard | Hackathon MongoDB Track Partner Integration

preset_list_db_desc: Discovers all available databases and lists their basic metrics.
preset_get_stats_desc: Retrieves storage size, index counts, and document stats for 'fahem'.
preset_schema_desc: Samples documents from 'users' collection to derive its schema.
preset_list_col_desc: Lists all collections in the 'fahem' database.
sourcing_engine_subtitle: Configure database pipelines, ingest raw streams, and map document fields.
query_completed_success: Query completed successfully. Please check the logs console for output details.
stream_error_occurred: An error occurred while streaming the agent output:
preset_list_db_query: List the databases, list collections for 'fahem' database, and retrieve database stats.
preset_get_stats_query: Analyze database statistics for the 'fahem' database and summarize storage size and index metrics.
preset_schema_query: Get the collection schema for the 'users' collection inside the 'fahem' database and describe its fields.
preset_list_col_query: List all collections present in the 'fahem' database.
terms_subtitle: Terms, conditions, and artificial intelligence usage guidelines for Fahem.
privacy_subtitle: Your data privacy, processing, and security guidelines.
ai_disclaimer_text: Fahem leverages Google Gemini AI models and MongoDB Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to analyze schemas, view statistics, and run queries programmatically. While the assistant is highly capable, all database manipulations, recommendations, and execution plans generated by the AI are provided 'as-is' without warranties. Users should review and verify critical statements, schema transformations, and direct queries prior to execution in production environments.
report_tool_desc: Report an issue, bug, or submit database feedback. Your report will be processed directly by our secure MongoDB Agent.
report_success: Your report was successfully ingested into MongoDB via the MCP Agent!
